coverage_contract.problem_pattern: Determine whether one depicted object is to the left or right of another object in a single image using localized visual comparison.
supported_variations: Questions asking if object A is on the left or right side of object B
Different everyday object pairs with the same left-vs-right spatial relation format
unsupported_variations: Cases requiring depth, front/behind, or multi-step spatial reasoning beyond simple horizontal relative position
forbidden_case_specific_assumptions: Do not hardcode specific object categories such as suitcase, river, pillar box, or telephone booth
Do not rely on fixed image regions or one-off coordinates for where target objects usually appear
coverage_contract.why_this_should_generalize: The family uses a stable question form with repeated failures from not applying any visual localization, so a reusable object-focused visual primitive plus a lightweight skill for horizontal relation judgment should transfer across object pairs.

coverage_contract.problem_pattern: Direct multiple-choice attribute questions about a specific visible entity, with recurring failures concentrated on identifying localized object color or similarly local visual attributes without focused inspection.
supported_variations: Color of a named object or clothing item belonging to a referenced person
Direct local attribute lookup for a referenced subject/object in multiple-choice form, including simple pose/state when the target entity is clearly identifiable
unsupported_variations: Questions requiring multi-step reasoning, counting, OCR, or ambiguous target resolution without a clearly referenced entity
forbidden_case_specific_assumptions: Do not hardcode any specific object class, person, or answer distribution from the representative images
Do not rely on fixed image regions, one-off coordinates, or center-biased cropping
Do not assume the queried attribute is always color or always attached to a woman
coverage_contract.why_this_should_generalize: Failures are clustered around a stable, reusable need: focusing on a referenced local region to read a simple visual attribute, especially color. A localized inspection primitive plus lightweight selection logic should transfer across many direct-attribute cases in this family.

rewrite_requirements: Write the artifact file before returning.
Keep ToolResult.artifacts aligned with real relative file paths.
